zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicole de VITRÉ於大約1240年出生在法國布列塔尼朋吉利阿貝時，她的父親André III de VITRE61歲，母親Catherine de THOUARS40歲。她於1265年與Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN在法國布列塔尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1307年3月11日在法國布列塔尼吉加普享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicole de VITRÉ于大约1240年出生在法国布列塔尼朋吉利阿貝时，她的父亲André III de VITRE61岁，母亲Catherine de THOUARS40岁。她于1265年与Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN在法国布列塔尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1307年3月11日在法国布列塔尼吉加普享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: VITRÉ
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): adaptation of a surname such as Greek   Mitropoulos   and Italian   Mitri  .
Albanian and Romanian: from the personal name Mitre, a short form of Albanian Dhimitër, Romanian Dumitru, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ).

variants.name: Mitropoulos
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Mitros + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese. Compare Metropoulos .

nameMeanings.name: Nicole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Nicholas  , now also in frequent use throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicole de VITRÉ was born about 1240, in Pont-l'Abbé, Brittany, France, her father, André III de VITRE, was 61 and her mother, Catherine de THOUARS, was 40. She married Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN in 1265, in Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 11 March 1307, in Guingamp, Brittany, France, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicole de VITRÉ est née environ 1240, à Pont-l'Abbé, Bretagne, France, son père, André III de VITRE, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Catherine de THOUARS, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN en 1265, à Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 mars 1307, à Guingamp, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicole de VITRÉ um 1240 in Pont-l'Abbé, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater André III de VITRE 61 und ihre Mutter Catherine de THOUARS 40. Sie hat 1265 in Bretagne, Frankreich Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. März 1307 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Guingamp, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicole de VITRÉ è nata il circa 1240 nel Pont-l'Abbé, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, André III de VITRE, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Catherine de THOUARS, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN nel 1265, nel Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 marzo 1307, nel Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicole de VITRÉが約1240年にフランスブレタグンポント-ル'アブeで生まれた時，父André III de VITREは61歳，母Catherine de THOUARSは40歳であった。1265年にフランスブレタグンでPierre IV de ROSTRENENと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1307年3月11日にフランスブレタグングインガンップで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicole de VITRÉ(이)가 대략 1240년 프랑스 브레타그니 폰트-'압브e에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 André III de VITRE(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de THOUARS(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1265년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1307년 3월 11일 프랑스 브레타그니 길그가프에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicole de VITRÉ nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Pont-l'Abbé, Bretagne, França, seu pai, André III de VITRE, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de THOUARS, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN em 1265, em Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de março de 1307, em Guingamp, Bretagne, França, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicole de VITRÉ родилась около 1240 г. в местности понт-л'аббe, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени André III de VITRE было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine de THOUARS, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN в 1265 г. в местности бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 11 марта 1307 г. в местности гуингамп, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicole de VITRÉ nació aproximadamente 1240, en Pont-l'Abbé, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, André III de VITRE, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Catherine de THOUARS, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN en 1265, en Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1307, en Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 68 años.
